semantic_meaning: Tracks where a contact sits in the buyer journey, from anonymous subscriber through to paying customer and evangelist. This is the single most important property for aligning marketing and sales handoffs.
auto_population_source: Can be set through imports, form submissions, workflows, and manually on a per-contact basis. HubSpot enforces forward-only progression by default (configurable).
common_uses: Marketing-to-sales handoff: trigger assignment workflows when stage moves from MQL to SQL
List segmentation: build active lists per lifecycle stage for targeted campaigns
Reporting: measure conversion rates between stages over time
Lead scoring: use lifecycle stage as a factor in lead qualification models
SLA enforcement: trigger alerts when contacts sit in a stage too long

alternatives_to_consider.when_appropriate: When you need finer-grained sales sub-statuses within a lifecycle stage (e.g., 'Attempting to contact', 'Connected', 'Bad timing')
When tracking opportunity progression within a specific deal pipeline rather than the contact's overall journey
